facebook.caption:
POV: you finally find a Vietnamese restaurant on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo that locals actually rate.

thì là is sitting at 4.7 stars across 765 reviews. That number doesn't lie.

Traditional Vietnamese food done right, no tourist markup, no gimmicks. Just solid cooking on one of Phu Quoc's busiest streets.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 765 people reviewed thì là and gave it 4.7 stars. Watch what lands on the table and you'll understand why. Đường Trần Hưng Đạo just got interesting.
